action.Custom.activate interphony.description: From 1.40.02 2073, if capability is allowed by OXE server for SIP users interphony must be activated from Settings / Telephony / Auto-answer OR by creating a Auto-answer progkey and pressing it to activate interphony.
action.Custom.activate interphony.evidence_template: From 1.40.02 2073, if capability is allowed by OXE server for SIP users interphony must be activated from Settings / Telephony / Auto-answer OR by creating a Auto-answer progkey and pressing it to activate interphony.

assertion.Custom.validate incoming call.description: The call log contains conference call log, emergency call log, and normal incoming call log with correct labels, avatars, names, numbers, and durations.
